title: Implement tenant step 2 save + set onboarding_complete
description: On 'Finish setup' in tenant step 2, upsert all tenant preferences to Supabase and mark onboarding_complete = true on profiles.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'Finish setup' reads locations from sessionStorage
Upserts a row in tenant_preferences with all collected data
On success: clears sessionStorage keys, redirects to /search
On error: shows inline error, does not redirect
Button shows loading state during the writes

steps.description: Read data from sessionStorage and form

steps.details:
const { error: profError } = await supabase.from('profiles').update({ onboarding_complete: true }).eq('id', userId);
if (prefError || profError) { showError('Something went wrong. Please try again.'); return; }
